understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all levels by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid; if a level has multiple goals, all must be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and continue until the final level is cleared.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controls the currently selected piece (shown as 'P'), moving in 3-pixel cell steps within the grid. Movement attempts can be blocked by walls ('#') or boundaries; the movement_blocked flags only indicate adjacent objects and don’t guarantee failure. Some adjacent objects (e.g., blocks 'B') can be pushed if you move into them and there is space for the block to shift. Levels may contain multiple selectables ('S'); using CLICK on a selectable’s exact pixel position switches control to that piece.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed by walls; try moving into a wall to test for wrap/teleport or sliding behavior. Attempt right first.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls; try moving into a wall to test for wrap/teleport or sliding behavior. Attempt right first.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re boxed in by walls; try moving into the right wall to see if it’s a passable/warp boundary.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls; try moving into the right wall to see if it’s a passable/warp boundary.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re trapped; test if pushing the adjacent selectable to the right is possible to make progress toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re trapped; test if pushing the adjacent selectable to the right is possible to make progress toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 4: MOVE_RIGHT | We’re enclosed by walls on all sides, so try moving into the right wall to test if it’s a pushable/portal-like boundary or triggers a shift.
history.reasoning: We’re enclosed by walls on all sides, so try moving into the right wall to test if it’s a pushable/portal-like boundary or triggers a shift.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_UP | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so try moving up to probe for any non-standard wall interaction/teleport despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so try moving up to probe for any non-standard wall interaction/teleport despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_DOWN | We appear enclosed by walls on all sides; try moving down to test if any boundary is actually passable despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed by walls on all sides; try moving down to test if any boundary is actually passable despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_UP | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides; try moving up anyway in case the hint is misleading or there’s a pass-through edge.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides; try moving up anyway in case the hint is misleading or there’s a pass-through edge.

history.summary: Turn 8: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls; switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls; switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 9: MOVE_UP | Move up into the goal cluster to occupy a goal tile (goals are non-collidable).
history.reasoning: Move up into the goal cluster to occupy a goal tile (goals are non-collidable).

history.summary: Turn 10: MOVE_RIGHT | Step right onto the goal cluster to satisfy the win condition for this level.
history.reasoning: Step right onto the goal cluster to satisfy the win condition for this level.
